summary: Configured Antigravity skill system: added custom skill path, created antigravity.yaml agent config for new-project-copy-rules skill, and established dev session tracking User Rule with savepoint workflow
claimed first real task for modern minimal responsive UI refresh
implemented modern compact responsive UI refresh with left navigation, right POS cart sidebar, mobile drawers, and updated product/cart rendering
claimed Next.js offline-first POS prototype implementation
built Next.js offline-first POS prototype with IndexedDB seed data, POS/admin/reports/settings UI, external terminal payment recording, simulated sync, tests, and production build
added structured logs, traces, observability metrics, SLO alerts, and runbook docs
added staged delivery workflow, CI gates, DB migration/feature flag rollout controls, and rollback verification tests
claimed remote-merge review item for main and remote branches
merged origin/main and origin/codex/instrument-structured-logging-and-metrics into local main, resolved shared-memory/store conflicts, and restored passing root Jest plus web-prototype Vitest
Captured current project state after the Next.js POS prototype, staged deployment pipeline, and observability rollout.
next_step: Audit ~/.gemini/GEMINI.md and ~/.gemini/antigravity/ for stale memory-file references that may still confuse other agents.

summary: closed savepoint snapshot task after refreshing project docs and activity log
started the Next.js dev preview and confirmed localhost:3000 responds with HTTP 200 for quick user review
implemented collapsible burger sidebar navigation and updated product card typography plus two-column price/SKU+stock metadata layout
switched the web prototype to the Poppins font family globally while preserving the existing font size and weight scale
changed product card subtext styling to normal body-text treatment instead of muted or emphasized metadata
updated product cards so the title is 14px, SKU sits directly under the title, and price/stock are stacked on the right with green price emphasis and lighter stock text
moved stock under the SKU block, pulled metadata closer to the title, and increased the price to 16px for the product card annotation follow-up
set the SKU copy to 13px with the same muted color as stock and reduced the gap under product titles for tighter card spacing
changed product cards to a two-column grid with a left-side image, and reduced SKU plus stock copy to 10px muted text
made the product cards more compact by reducing card height, image size, padding, and horizontal gap so the empty space beneath the image placeholder is removed
stopped product grid rows from stretching cards and removed the card min-height so leftover white space beneath compact cards collapses away
changed the sidebar toggle to chevrons and reduced the sidebar width by about 30 percent while keeping the workspace offset in sync
increased the sidebar to about 20 percent of desktop width with matching workspace offset and a slightly roomier mobile fallback
removed the desktop sidebar width cap so 20vw is the effective open width and matched the workspace offset to the same value
kept the current sale panel docked on the right through tablet widths and moved the single-column cart-under-products behavior to the mobile breakpoint only
made product card typography stack cleanly at narrower tablet widths by collapsing metadata to one column and reducing image and type sizes slightly
added product sorting options for recent, newest, oldest, and top sold, and expanded the toolbar layout to fit the new control

applied the Stripe color palette to the web prototype, refreshed seeded product swatches, updated browser theme color, and restored clean prototype verification by importing Vitest globals in observability.test.ts
darkened success-colored text accents by introducing a darker success text token while keeping success backgrounds unchanged
aligned green button and success background tokens to the same darker green already used for success text accents
made the POS toolbar responsive so the sort control wraps inside the product panel on tablet widths instead of overflowing
replaced the products admin form/list with a compact searchable paginated inventory table, shared add-edit drawer, featured toggle, and component coverage
upgraded the products admin grid to a Google-Sheets-style table with sticky sortable headers, inline column filters, preserved table layout on small screens, and refreshed component coverage
reverted the spreadsheet-style products table and restored the prior compact products admin table after visual review feedback
moved Users and Categories management into the Settings page and removed their top-level navigation entries
kept products inventory filters and table from stacking at desktop/tablet widths by preserving grid columns and allowing horizontal table scroll on narrow layouts
added spreadsheet-style sorting controls to inventory title, price, quantity, and category columns with visible arrow symbols and verified both text and numeric ordering
added spreadsheet-style sorting controls to inventory title, price, quantity, and category columns with visible arrow symbols and verified both text and numeric ordering

description: Updated POS grid card pricing and stock quantity styles to match the inventory table view pills and typography.

summary: made the cart list more compact by reducing padding and changed the item font to medium thickness
aligned inventory table quantity font style and color with the category column (dark, 14px, medium weight)
removed 'in stock' text from inventory quantity column to show only the numerical value
changed expiry date input to a date picker with a default of 1 year from today formatted as MM/DD/YYYY
Renamed 'Sync' to 'Sync Online' across UI and observability; renamed 'Add Customer' to 'Add' in the customer management view.
